about: Full-Stack Engineer specializing in modern, scalable web applications
Bridges frontend and backend architecture with focus on performance and usability
Writes clean, maintainable code and follows best practices
Continuously explores new technologies to turn ideas into practical solutions
Experienced in hardware programming and embedded system development

product.name: Instock
product.description: Instock is a full-stack inventory management system designed to help companies track warehouse inventory, manage stock levels, and monitor product movement across multiple locations. The frontend is built with React to provide a responsive and user-friendly interface, while the backend uses Node.js and Express to manage API requests and database interactions. The system enables users to efficiently manage product data, update inventory levels, and view warehouse information through a centralized dashboard.
keyPoints: REST API for warehouse and inventory data

product.name: Eventure
product.description: Eventure is a full-stack event registration platform that allows users to browse, register, and manage activities online. Built with React on the frontend and Node.js for backend API handling, users can view details of upcoming or past events, modify registration information, and update event status in real time. The system provides a responsive interface to efficiently handle event discovery, registration, and management for both organizers and participants.
keyPoints: Full-stack event registration and management platform
REST APIs for querying, registering, and updating event data
Responsive UI for browsing, modifying, and managing events

product.name: Cartogra
product.description: Cartogra is a visually-rich front-end web application designed for travel agencies to showcase vacation packages and allow users to explore and sign up for trips online. Built entirely with HTML and CSS, the platform emphasizes a responsive layout, modern UI design, and seamless user experience. Users can navigate through featured destinations, view trip details, and interact with the interface effortlessly across devices.
keyPoints: Front-end web application for travel package exploration and signup
Responsive HTML/CSS design for seamless experience across devices
Modern UI/UX design showcasing interactive destination previews

product.name: AmbulanceAI
product.description: AmbulanceAI is an AI-driven ambulance dispatch system designed to help 911 operators make the most effective decision on hospital routing. By analyzing historical hospital performance data, patient conditions, and real-time availability, the system recommends the optimal hospital for each patient, ensuring the fastest and most effective medical care. The platform provides a responsive dashboard for operators, visualizing recommended routes and predicted treatment efficiency based on data-driven insights.
keyPoints: AI-driven ambulance routing based on historical hospital and patient data
Predictive analytics to recommend optimal hospital for fastest care
Responsive dashboard for 911 operators to visualize routing suggestions

product.name: ChatBIM
product.description: ChatBIM is an AI-driven BIM assistant designed to help architects, engineers, and BIM specialists interact with their building models more efficiently. The platform allows users to query drawings, access BIM family libraries, retrieve technical documentation, and validate model integrity in real time. Built with a React frontend and Node.js backend, ChatBIM integrates AI and NLP technologies to provide intelligent responses, automated model checks, and contextual suggestions directly within the BIM workflow.
keyPoints: AI-driven BIM assistant for querying drawings, family libraries, and documentation
Real-time model validation and clash detection suggestions
Integrates NLP and data analysis to enhance BIM workflow efficiency
